description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, open floor plan and multiple rooms visible from above. The exterior features a mix of white and beige walls, with large windows and several doors providing access to the outside. The property includes a fenced backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and landscaped greenery such as palm trees, bushes, and flowering plants. The front of the bungalow has a driveway leading to a garage, a covered entryway, and additional garden beds. The roof is flat, with some sections slightly raised, and the overall design is modern with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. Outdoor amenities like a pool, patio, and garden areas enhance the livability and appeal of the home.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: This view highlights the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and lush landscaping, as well as the open layout of the bungalow's interior rooms.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and front garden beds, with palm trees lining the rear boundary.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the rear and side garden areas, with trees and shrubs, and provides a clear look at the bungalow's back rooms and pool area.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the patio and pool area, with the flat roof and open-plan living spaces visible, as well as the side garden and entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
